---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for MarkSnip
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Summary**
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like to see in MarkSnip.

**Feature category**
Which area of MarkSnip does this relate to? (check all that apply)
- [ ] Page clipping / article extraction
- [ ] Markdown conversion (formatting, tables, code blocks, math)
- [ ] Image handling
- [ ] Batch URL processing
- [ ] Obsidian integration
- [ ] Context menu options
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts
- [ ] Front/back matter templates
- [ ] Extension popup / UI
- [ ] New browser/platform support
- [ ] Other: 

**Problem this solves**
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.
E.g. "When I clip documentation pages, code blocks lose their language tags and..."

**Proposed solution**
A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried or considered.

**Example / mockup**
If applicable, share an example URL, screenshot, or mockup that illustrates what you have in mind.

**Additional context**
Any other context, links, or prior art that would help understand this request.
